```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Write Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)"
---
# Architecture Decision Records
## Task
Write ADRs for significant architecture decisions.
## Requirements
1. Title with decision number. 2. Status (proposed/accepted/deprecated/superseded).
3. Context describing the problem. 4. Decision with rationale.
5. Consequences (positive and negative).
## Constraints
- One decision per ADR. Keep concise. Link to superseding ADR if deprecated.
## Success Criteria
- Decision documented with reasoning. Consequences acknowledged. Findable by number.
```
